steps.title: Apply Text 2's time frame
steps.content: Text 2 argues that merger research overemphasizes short-term price harms and should examine long-term effects, where efficiency gains may benefit consumers.

steps.title: Respond to Lin's finding
steps.content: A only compares nearby markets, B predicts higher company expenses, and D makes an unsupported industry claim. Rinaldi and Costa would ask whether Lin's projected subscription-price increase lasts over an extended period. The answer is C.
